item.name: Alte Roite Prism
item.description: A multifaceted prism that, when held aloft, refracts light in a way that can be seen only by your Alte Roite mount─a being who possesses the uncanny ability to hide in plain sight until summoned.

mount.name: Alte Roite
mount.action: Summon forth Alte Roite, fantastical ur-being generated by Omega within the Deltascape.
mount.description: While none can be certain the exact intentions of a self-aware interdimensional construct, logic suggests this winged aberration is a reimagination of Alte Roite─a legendary wizard who is said could take the shape of a dragon at will.
mount.tooltip:
That knowledge is my ticket
straight to glory. I can't go
telling any old person about it.
- Bonifoix
